name: DoctoLeb Messaging And Notification Process ERD

tables.name: staff_members
tables.comments: Staff seat, role, and lifecycle state.

tables.name: patients
tables.comments: Clinical patient profile linked to a user.

tables.name: patient_devices
tables.comments: Patient device used for push delivery.

tables.name: conversations
tables.comments: Message thread between patient and clinic users.

tables.name: message_read_receipts
tables.comments: Read state for each message recipient.

tables.name: notification_deliveries
tables.comments: Delivery attempt for a notification event.

notes.content: Read: FK > owner. Areas group schemas. Lines should flow left to right.
conversation has participants; messages create attachments, receipts, events, and deliveries.
